name: Corn Bread Cups for Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cream together butter and cream cheese in a mixer. Add chopped red bell pepper and scallions. Mix.
3. In a separate bowl, combine flour, cornmeal, and salt.
4. Gradually add the dry mixture to the butter mixture, stirring constantly until well blended.
5. Remove the dough from the bowl and knead by hand. Form into 2-inch balls.
6. Press each ball into a medium-sized muffin tin, ensuring even coverage up the side of the cup.
- Alternatively, you can make 1-inch balls and use mini muffin tins.
7. Bake for 20 minutes or until golden brown.
